title: FireGod's Super Modpack
description: This modpack is an Modpack that optimizes the game, and fixes some questions people may have.
body: Hey, Welcome. Ever wanna optimize the game? Ever Wonder why there's a gap in between the outer layer of your Minecraft skin? Ever wonder why there are Armor Trims but Not Tool Trims? Well, this Modpack's Got you covered. This Modpack does all of those things while aiming to be the Modpack to fix everything like Java's old Slow Engine. It adds Tool Trims, Optimizes Minecraft with mods from Fabulously Optimized, adds Chat Heads, makes the Outer Layer 3D, and Removes the Gap. Note: 1.21 support isn't available yet as all the 1.20 mods LOVE to prevent me from launching 1.21. Note: I had my settings in it but because they are for beefy computers and are probably intensive on Regular Computers I opened the file up with WinRAR and took out the overrides.
